prompt: Camera pan right. Blue hour in a dense financial district after light rain, with a broad avenue running diagonally toward a cluster of glass towers and older stone midrises. Wet asphalt mirrors white lane markings, tram tracks, traffic lights, and the red glow of brake lamps. On the near side, a bus shelter, newspaper kiosk, bike rack, and evenly spaced trees anchor the foreground; farther along, stacked fire escapes, rooftop water tanks, and layered façades create crisp depth cues. Elevated walkways connect two buildings above the street, while distant high-rises taper cleanly into haze, emphasizing converging lines and exact scale.

Camera move left, pull out, then pan left. A grand civic library atrium organized around a rectangular void, with four levels of balconies, brass railings, and repeating limestone columns receding in precise perspective. In the foreground, a long oak information desk sits beside turnstiles, brochure stands, and a terrazzo floor patterned with dark geometric inlays that guide the eye toward a far reading room. Suspended ring lights hang from a gridded skylight, casting soft reflections onto polished stone. Glass study pods, stair landings, elevator doors, and neatly aligned bookshelves create layered depth, while a few patrons at tables provide human scale without disrupting the rigorous symmetry.

Camera move right, pull out, then pan right. A sprawling intermodal rail terminal beside a steel truss bridge and freight yard at first light, built from long, legible axes and repeated structural bays. The nearest platform edge shows tactile paving, drainage grates, signal cabinets, and numbered signs; beyond it, parallel tracks split and rejoin beneath catenary masts, overhead wires, and gantries. A concrete concourse with glass walls spans the lines, connecting escalators, waiting areas, and ticket barriers inside. To one side stand fuel tanks, maintenance sheds, stacked pallets, and a parked service vehicle; farther back, the bridge lattice and distant cranes form a demanding web of straight lines, scale changes, and vanishing points.

Camera push in. Midtown canyon at golden hour, centered on a straight avenue that funnels toward a luminous skyline of stepped art deco towers, mirrored office slabs, and a needle-thin residential high-rise in the far distance. The street grid is meticulously ordered: crosswalk stripes, sewer covers, curb cuts, bike lanes, median planters, and synchronized traffic signals all align with the perspective. Storefront glass reflects passing buses, pedestrians, and rows of taxis, while upper façades carry cornices, setbacks, window grids, and rooftop mechanical decks. Warm light rakes across brick and steel, deepening shadows in side streets and sharpening the recession toward the horizon.
